questionHtml: The enthalpy change for the reaction to produce B is −213 kJ. Predict, giving a reason, which product is the most stable.
markschemeHtml:
B AND it has a more negative/lower enthalpy/«potential» energy
OR
B AND more exothermic «enthalpy of reaction from same starting point»  [✔]

meta.title: The enthalpy change for the reaction to produce B is −213 kJ. Predict, giving a reason, which product is the most stable.
